response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON incorrectly identified the first song as 'Loveit?' by PinocchioP, but the audio was actually 'Lovi' (ラヴィ) by Hiiragi Kirai. I ignored the incorrect lyrics and fully transcribed the actual song. 2. JSON Usage: Used manual transcription and translation for 'Lovi', the MC talk segment, and the second song 'V' by Gohgo. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed both songs tightly to match the high-tempo vocalization, including precise MC speech tracking and quick, instantaneous lyric transitions.

subtitles.original: ずっと下向いた顔が可愛いな
subtitles.english: Your face looking down all the time is so cute

subtitles.original: 君のその身体が欲しいの
subtitles.english: I want that body of yours

subtitles.original: ラヴィ何？ 割と愛 ハイハイ
subtitles.english: Lovi what? Relatively love, yes, yes

subtitles.original: 可哀想ね 君は悪い子なの？
subtitles.english: How pitiful, are you a bad child?

subtitles.original: どの子がお好きで サニサニ
subtitles.english: Which girl do you like? Sunny, sunny

subtitles.original: 色目やお上手でたわむれ
subtitles.english: Flirting so skillfully, just playing around

subtitles.original: 君に踊らされちゃって私は狂う
subtitles.english: Being danced around by you, I'm going crazy

subtitles.original: What is loveit?
subtitles.english: What is loveit?

subtitles.original: 君のなかまで 骨の髄まで
subtitles.english: Deep inside you, to the very marrow of your bones

subtitles.original: いれてからあとになる愛のパペット
subtitles.english: After putting it in, you become a puppet of love

subtitles.original: 胸が苦しいね 息が詰まるのね
subtitles.english: Your chest feels tight, doesn't it? You're suffocating, aren't you?

subtitles.original: それが恋と教えてあげる アハハ
subtitles.english: I'll teach you that that is love, ahaha

subtitles.original: ずるい声で ほら囁いて
subtitles.english: Come on, whisper to me with that sly voice

subtitles.original: いい子ね 首輪はつけた？君はラヴィ
subtitles.english: Good child. Did you put on the collar? You are Lovi

subtitles.original: イカれちゃったのね 恋は盲目ね
subtitles.english: You've gone mad, haven't you? Love is blind, after all

subtitles.original: したいようにしてあげるわ いつまで
subtitles.english: I'll let you do whatever you want, forever

subtitles.original: 濡れた君の赤い脊髄 汚れるまで
subtitles.english: Until your wet, red spinal cord is stained

subtitles.original: 痛いの飛んでいけ 死んでラヴィになるまで
subtitles.english: Pain, pain, go away, until you die and become Lovi

subtitles.original: 愚かね 愚かね 間抜けな顔して君は悪い子なの
subtitles.english: How foolish, how foolish, with that blank face, you're a bad child

subtitles.original: 痛いのがお好きで サニサニ
subtitles.english: So you like pain? Sunny, sunny

subtitles.original: あらお口はチャックで何々
subtitles.english: My, zip your mouth shut, what's what

subtitles.original: 君に踊らされちゃう君は狂う
subtitles.english: Danced around, you also go crazy

subtitles.original: What is...
subtitles.english: What is...

subtitles.original: 君のなかまで 骨の髄まで
subtitles.english: Deep inside you, to the very marrow of your bones

subtitles.original: しゃぶりつくせばもう空っぽのパペット
subtitles.english: Once sucked dry, you're just an empty puppet

subtitles.original: 胸が苦しいね 息が詰まるのね
subtitles.english: Your chest feels tight, doesn't it? You're suffocating, aren't you?

subtitles.original: それが恋と教えてあげる アハハ
subtitles.english: I'll teach you that that is love, ahaha

subtitles.original: 君はピエロね 愛を囁いて
subtitles.english: You're a clown, aren't you? Whisper love to me

subtitles.original: 人間の形した君はラヴィ
subtitles.english: You, who took a human shape, are Lovi

subtitles.original: イカれちゃったのね 恋は盲目ね
subtitles.english: You've gone mad, haven't you? Love is blind, after all

subtitles.original: したいようにしてあげるわ いつまで
subtitles.english: I'll let you do whatever you want, forever

subtitles.original: 報い尽くせない汚れ達に溺れるまで
subtitles.english: Until you drown in sins that can never be paid back

subtitles.original: 痛いの飛んでいけ 息が止まるまで
subtitles.english: Pain, pain, go away, until your breath stops

subtitles.original: 報い尽くせない汚れ達に溺れるまで
subtitles.english: Until you drown in sins that can never be paid back

subtitles.original: 痛いの飛んでいけ 息が止まるまで
subtitles.english: Pain, pain, go away, until your breath stops

subtitles.original: お待たせー！
subtitles.english: Sorry to keep you waiting!

subtitles.original: 本日は、伊咲リオナ生誕祭2026に遊びに来てくれて、本当にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for coming to Isaki Riona's Birthday Festival 2026 today!

subtitles.original: Let's the show begin、えっと、V、きっと、ラヴィと、3曲続けて披露させていただきました！
subtitles.english: I just performed three songs in a row: 'Let's the show begin', 'V', and 'Lovi'!

subtitles.original: どうですかー？
subtitles.english: What do you think?!

subtitles.original: 改めて自己紹介させてください！
subtitles.english: Please let me introduce myself once again!

subtitles.original: 私の元に、おいで！
subtitles.english: Come to me!

subtitles.original: リオナ・イン・ザ・ステージ！
subtitles.english: Riona on the stage!

subtitles.original: FLOWGLOWのリーダー、伊咲リオナです！プロー！
subtitles.english: I'm the leader of FLOWGLOW, Isaki Riona! Flow-!

subtitles.original: よろしくお願いします！
subtitles.english: Nice to meet you!

subtitles.original: はぁ、息切れが、息切れがヤバいんですけど...
subtitles.english: Phew, I'm so, so out of breath...

subtitles.original: はい、今日のですね、ハッシュタグはこちら！
subtitles.english: Anyway, today's hashtag is this!

subtitles.original: 伊咲リオナ生誕祭2026です！
subtitles.english: Isaki Riona Birthday Festival 2026!

subtitles.original: たくさん、たくさん、呟いてください！
subtitles.english: Please tweet a lot, a lot!

subtitles.original: 私、絶対見に行くのでね！
subtitles.english: Because I will definitely go check them out!

subtitles.original: みんなが、感想とか、送ってくれるの、すごく楽しみにしています！
subtitles.english: I'm really looking forward to everyone sending thoughts and feedback!

subtitles.original: そしてですね...
subtitles.english: And also...

subtitles.original: 本日、ライブパフォーマンスさせていただくステージは、こちらです！
subtitles.english: This is the stage where I'll be performing live today!

subtitles.original: どうですかー？
subtitles.english: How do you like it?!

subtitles.original: ショーみたいでさ、めっちゃ良くない？
subtitles.english: It feels like a show, isn't it awesome?

subtitles.original: あとね、伊咲リオナっていうね、名前がたくさん刻まれていたり...
subtitles.english: And look, the name 'Isaki Riona' is engraved all over...

subtitles.original: ハートの風船だったり、王冠だったり...
subtitles.english: with heart balloons, crowns...

subtitles.original: いろんな装飾があって、とってもキラキラしてます！
subtitles.english: and various decorations, it's so sparkly!

subtitles.original: ここでね、踊れることが今日すごくすごく幸せです！ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: I'm so, so happy to be dancing here today! Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: そして、本日のライブのタイトルが「THE ONE AND ONLY」となっております！
subtitles.english: And the title of today's live is 'THE ONE AND ONLY'!

subtitles.original: こちらの意味は、「唯一無二」という意味です！
subtitles.english: This means 'the one and only' or 'unique'!

subtitles.original: このタイトルに恥じないように、全力で、全力でパフォーマンスしていくので...
subtitles.english: To live up to this title, I will perform with all my might...

subtitles.original: どうかこの時間が、あなたの心に何か届けられる、そんな時間になれるように...
subtitles.english: so I hope this can be a moment that delivers something to your heart...

subtitles.original: 今日は頑張りたいと思います！
subtitles.english: I'll do my absolute best today!

subtitles.original: それでは次は、おまちかねのゲストパートです！
subtitles.english: Now next up is the long-awaited guest part!

subtitles.original: どうぞ！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: Blah Blah VIRTUAL Blah Blah
subtitles.english: Blah Blah VIRTUAL Blah Blah

subtitles.original: I'm a B...
subtitles.english: I'm a B...

subtitles.original: I'm a B... La Vida La Vida La Vida Love... blah blah blah
subtitles.english: I'm a B... La Vida La Vida La Vida Love... blah blah blah

subtitles.original: たかだかノーマルな混沌
subtitles.english: At most, just a normal chaos

subtitles.original: さわらばかわいいのこと
subtitles.english: If you touch it, it's a cute thing

subtitles.original: 高天原からほら
subtitles.english: Look, from Takamagahara

subtitles.original: 戻してあげる
subtitles.english: I'll bring you back

subtitles.original: Hi, そう メンヘラ
subtitles.english: Hi, yes, a mental health case

subtitles.original: お面がキュートならメンキラー
subtitles.english: If the mask is cute, a men-killer

subtitles.original: とか貼られた レッテル イッてる メンタル
subtitles.english: Labels like that being stuck on, an insane mental state

subtitles.original: は？
subtitles.english: Huh?

subtitles.original: 最狂 スマイルで
subtitles.english: With the craziest smile

subtitles.original: 転がしてく ペンペン
subtitles.english: Rolling them over, pen-pen

subtitles.original: 誤魔化してる正真正銘 晒されたら バイバイ
subtitles.english: Deceiving, genuine and true, if exposed, then bye-bye

subtitles.original: なんてな
subtitles.english: Just kidding

subtitles.original: I'm a V, I'm a V, I'm a V...
subtitles.english: I'm a V, I'm a V, I'm a V...

subtitles.original: I am...
subtitles.english: I am...

subtitles.original: La Vida La Vida La Vida...
subtitles.english: La Vida La Vida La Vida...

subtitles.original: 夢見てる少年
subtitles.english: Dreaming boys...

subtitles.original: 夢見てる少女へ
subtitles.english: To dreaming girls...

subtitles.original: Vだ、Vだ、Vは 甘々甘々脳
subtitles.english: V, V, V is a sweet, sweet brain

subtitles.original: 刺激 ギギ ギギ も そう
subtitles.english: Stimulation, -tion, -tion, -tion is also like that

subtitles.original: 我を忘れて
subtitles.english: Losing yourself...
